title: astragalus neokarelinianus
intro: Astragalus neokarelinianus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, native to China and Russia. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its immunomodulatory and adaptogenic properties, which are believed to enhance the body's natural ability to resist disease and stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus neokarelinianus are thought to provide various health benefits, including improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus neokarelinianus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
